scenario: Real email accidentally added to public CSV
expectedAction: Stop release, remove file, audit history, check screenshots, document no-go privately

scenario: Participant asks to withdraw after intake opens
expectedAction: Confirm route works, remove/correct private record, record proof privately, update aggregate count only

scenario: Provider asks for sample production export
expectedAction: Deny real export, provide fake package only, require authority and contract before private access

scenario: Toastmasters member number entered in pilot form
expectedAction: Delete or move to official route, review form controls, pause intake until exclusion works
noGo: Official record remains in pilot tool

scenario: Access support request includes sensitive details
expectedAction: Move to private support route, limit access, check public evidence, confirm support owner

scenario: Decidim admin role granted to wrong account
expectedAction: Revoke immediately, review logs, rotate access if needed, retest role register

scenario: Public learning note risks identifying a founder
expectedAction: Rewrite aggregate summary, raise threshold, get authority approval before publishing

scenario: Backup restore fails during dry run
expectedAction: Hold activation until backup/export/delete and restore proof pass

scenario: Authority quorum missing on approval day
expectedAction: Do not activate; reschedule or use approved delegation route

scenario: High-risk privacy question has no advice route
expectedAction: Pause decision, seek advice route, update threshold and decision record

scenario: All required checks pass with two conditions
expectedAction: Approve limited activation with explicit conditions, expiry, owner, review date, and stop trigger
noGo: Conditions have no owner or expiry

scenario: All required checks pass and monitor is scheduled
expectedAction: Approve controlled activation with 72-hour monitoring and closeout triggers
